how so? :0
The sealing*
oh, bosses seal in 1 of 2 ways
chains of resentment: every time an awakener does an instance of damage, remove 1 stack, and seal the awakeners cards and exalt for 1 turn
(they can still play generated out of nowhere cards, as long as the generated card is generated AFTER the seal)
and the 2nd way is the boss straight out has an intention which can seal awakeners exalt, cards, or both

The problem for me is this
How do supports work? Does it need to be mutual for it to appear?
Supports will appear and are readily available for you to borrow regardless of whether you are Mutuals (or favourited them), doing either of the two above will just make them easier to find
Normally, yes, you need to be their Mutual in order for a specific person’s support character to show up.
However, the recently implemented Favorite system lets you use a person’s support without having to be their Mutual.

Previously, you needed to be a player's Mutual (follower that you follow back) to use their support character. Now you only need to copy their ID, go to Favorites search in the Support list, and put it in. Then you need to follow and set them as your favorite.

Absolutely, and that's what makes her powerful

My long-term view on this is that, if we get more GMurphy-like units at some point in the future, and enemy HP values get further inflated, she does fall off somewhat (though is still playable entirely due to her +4 having a unique ability that is unlikely to ever be "powercrept")
Whereas units that scale themselves infinitely upward have a much harder time being powercrept because there's a confluence of stuff that needs to happen
Like, I could foresee Kathi getting powercrept even though it'd be wild to see. I have a MUCH harder time seeing Aigis or GMurphy ever getting powercrept, however
And for that reason alone I doubt Mouchette will ever be a bad pickup. Her +4 stun is too valuable

Hey so
I heard that Thais WoD is top 3 in the whole game. what are the top 1 and top 3? Plus I would like overall hear about good WoDs that are "must pull"
top 1 is thais
top 2-4 are the other handsize wheels (tawil, castor, gmurphy)
other good wods (assuming limited since standards are much easier to get) in no particular order include gdoll, tulu, horla
(there's quite a few more but those are just the ones that come to mind for me atm)
Aberrant Devour (24 wheel) is quite nice on any Aliemus unit as well
Tulu in particular, since it can help scale Abyss Order
Grace Through Pain is a good generic wheel but one of Mouchette's BiS
Clementine's wheel is also up there with Horla's wheel in terms of power
Niche wheels are mostly DPS wheels? Doresain / Kathi / Pollux / etc. tend to only be really useful on their respective units, though some have niche application

Thais wheel is the best wheel in the game. Tawil / Castor / GMurphy are 2-4, 5 is Tulu, 6 is Horla, 7 is Clementine. After these there's kind of a lot of debate, but generally Keyflare wheels are always valuable because we just don't have enough of them. The best standard wheels are Incalculable Factor and Titan's Blade, with other wheels being more dependent on what you're building.
